mapper.select: SELECT res_id, com_id, res_code, res_name, res_type, quantity, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM resource WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND res_id = #{resId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource (com_id, res_code, res_name, res_type, quantity, remark) VALUES (#{comId}, #{resCode}, #{resName}, #{resType}, #{quantity}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET res_code = #{resCode}, res_name = #{resName}, res_type = #{resType}, quantity = #{quantity}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND res_id = #{resId}
